basic_details.job_title: Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Allahabad High Court Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Special Judicial Magistrate posts! Published at allahabadhighcourt.in, this new recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier and possessing a Degree in Law or equivalent experience in legal affairs can apply offline from now to 25-07-2026. Find all details about the Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, offline application form, and notificati

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier.
age_limit.details: Term of office is four years or attaining the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree of law or otherwise well experienced in relation to legal affairs. Must hold or have held any post under the Government.
qualification.details: Degree of law or otherwise well experienced in relation to legal affairs to the satisfaction of the High Court. Holds or has held any post under the Government.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 45,000/- per month and Rs. 5000/- per month for conveyance
salary_details.details: Rs. 45,000/- per month (Honorarium) Rs. 5000/- per month (Conveyance)

selection_process: Scrutiny of Form by District Judge Forwarding of fit applications to High Court Selection by High Court
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: allahabadhighcourt.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Allahabad High Court Special Judicial Magistrate post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Special Judicial Magistrate post is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Special Judicial Magistrate position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a degree in law or have significant experience in legal affairs. Additionally, they must have held or currently hold a post under the Government.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Special Judicial Magistrate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive an honorarium of Rs. 45,000/- per month, along with a conveyance allowance of Rs. 5000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Special Judicial Magistrate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Special Judicial Magistrate position by the Allahabad High Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The term of office for the Special Judicial Magistrate is four years or until the individual attains the age of 70 years, whichever comes first.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Special Judicial Magistrate post is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Special Judicial Magistrate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of the application form by the District Judge, forwarding of suitable applications to the High Court, and final selection by the High Court.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for the Special Judicial Magistrate recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form, along with all relevant documents, should be submitted to the District Judge of the district for which the candidate is applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Special Judicial Magistrate post is on a contract basis.
